name: @gotong/example-tea-supply-link
description: 奶茶店 ↔ 供货商 (跨组织供货链接) — an ORGANIZATION hub template whose workflow orchestrates a restock order to a SUPPLIER on another hub through the outbound approval gate (店长 approves before the order leaves the org). The cross-org LINK is runtime peer config, NOT in the template. Deterministic, no API key.
